complaints.message:
Confirm object synset assignment.
Object assigned to synset: shelf.n.01
Definition: a support that consists of a horizontal surface for holding objects
Reminder: synset should match the object and not its contents.
(e.g. orange juice bottle needs to match orange_juice__bottle.n.01
and not orange_juice.n.01)
complaints.complaint: looks too thin might be wallmounted shelf
